opportunities.title: LLM Evaluation Regression Workflows
opportunities.customer: Product engineering teams shipping LLM features
opportunities.pain: Teams need repeatable ways to catch quality regressions before LLM features reach customers.
opportunities.currentWorkaround: Ad hoc spreadsheets, hand-curated prompts, and manual review sessions.
opportunities.wedge: A small-team eval runner that turns production failures into regression suites with plain-language reports.
opportunities.businessModel: Seat-based SaaS with paid CI usage for teams shipping LLM workflows.
opportunities.validationStep: Collect 15 examples of teams reverting prompts or models because tests missed a regression.
opportunities.whyNow: 35 current evidence items versus prior peak 44 across 8 source types, including 14 pain signals and 10 spend signals.

opportunities.title: AI Agent Operations and Recovery
opportunities.customer: Teams using browser or workflow agents in production
opportunities.pain: Agent workflows fail in ambiguous states and teams need recovery, audit, and handoff controls.
opportunities.currentWorkaround: Manual babysitting, logs, screenshots, and rerunning failed tasks from scratch.
opportunities.wedge: An operations layer for agent runs: checkpoints, human handoff, replay, and failure taxonomies.
opportunities.businessModel: Usage-based SaaS priced by agent run volume.
opportunities.validationStep: Interview teams running agents against real browsers, support queues, or internal workflows.
opportunities.whyNow: 54 current evidence items versus prior peak 92 across 7 source types, including 22 pain signals and 11 spend signals.

opportunities.title: Usage-Based Billing Operations
opportunities.customer: API and AI infrastructure startups moving to usage pricing
opportunities.pain: Usage-priced startups struggle to reconcile events, invoices, credits, and customer disputes.
opportunities.currentWorkaround: Warehouse queries, Stripe exports, support escalations, and one-off scripts.
opportunities.wedge: A billing-ops cockpit that reconciles usage events to invoices and flags disputes before renewal calls.
opportunities.businessModel: SaaS priced by monthly tracked revenue or invoice volume.
opportunities.validationStep: Talk to 10 API startups that introduced credits or usage tiers in the last year.
opportunities.whyNow: 60 current evidence items versus prior peak 65 across 6 source types, including 27 pain signals and 33 spend signals.

opportunities.title: Auth and SSO Integration Debugging
opportunities.customer: Small B2B SaaS teams adding enterprise SSO
opportunities.pain: Teams lose engineering time debugging authentication edge cases for enterprise customers.
opportunities.currentWorkaround: Support tickets, scattered provider docs, and custom debug scripts.
opportunities.wedge: A hosted SSO test harness that reproduces customer identity-provider setups and explains failed login flows.
opportunities.businessModel: Developer-tool SaaS priced by environment or enterprise customer count.
opportunities.validationStep: Find 20 recent unresolved OAuth, SAML, and Auth0 questions and ask maintainers which failures blocked deals.
opportunities.whyNow: 55 current evidence items versus prior peak 116 across 5 source types, including 10 pain signals and 9 spend signals.

opportunities.title: SOC2 Evidence Automation for Small AI Vendors
opportunities.customer: Tiny AI startups selling to enterprise buyers
opportunities.pain: Small AI vendors need SOC2 evidence without a dedicated GRC owner.
opportunities.currentWorkaround: Screenshots, Google Drive folders, spreadsheets, and repeated manual exports.
opportunities.wedge: A lightweight evidence inbox that captures policies, screenshots, logs, and vendor docs into auditor-ready packets.
opportunities.businessModel: Usage-tiered SaaS sold to startups entering enterprise procurement.
opportunities.validationStep: Interview 10 seed-to-Series-B AI founders who recently lost or delayed an enterprise deal during security review.
opportunities.whyNow: 31 current evidence items versus prior peak 30 across 5 source types, including 12 pain signals and 31 spend signals.

opportunities.title: Data Pipeline Reliability for Lean Teams
opportunities.customer: Small data teams supporting revenue and operations dashboards
opportunities.pain: Lean teams need to detect schema drift and stale metrics before business users lose trust.
opportunities.currentWorkaround: Slack alerts, dbt tests, manual dashboard checks, and tribal knowledge.
opportunities.wedge: A narrow monitor that watches high-value tables and explains broken downstream business metrics.
opportunities.businessModel: Team SaaS priced by monitored data assets.
opportunities.validationStep: Find teams with one to three data engineers and ask which dashboard failures caused executive escalations.
opportunities.whyNow: 29 current evidence items versus prior peak 93 across 3 source types, including 6 pain signals and 6 spend signals.
